---
title: "Kim van Rijswijk"
format:
  html:
    echo: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <script type="module" src="content/cube.js"></script>
---

## About me
Hi ! I am Kim van Rijswijk, a software developper specialized in computer graphics. In this website, you will be able to see my 
projects, as well as my academic and professional career. 

```{ojs}
viewof my_3d_canvas = {
  const canvas = html`<canvas width="800" height="800"></canvas>`;

  const { createCube } = await import("../../content/cube.js");
  createCube(canvas);

  return canvas;
}
```
